name: Breast of Pheasant Under Glass
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove skin from pheasant breasts and trim excess fat.
2. Flatten the breasts slightly using a meat mallet.
3. Rub each breast with lemon juice, then season with salt and pepper.
4. Melt 3 tablespoons of butter in a 9-inch skillet over medium heat.
5. When the butter foams, add the pheasant breasts and sauté for 3 minutes on each side.
6. Do not overcook; the meat should be pink, and the juices clear yellow.
7. Remove the breasts from the skillet and keep warm.
8. Add shallots to the drippings in the skillet and sauté until golden brown.
9. Drain the butter from the shallots and set aside.
10. Add brandy and wine to the skillet; reduce by half its volume.
11. Add cream and meat glaze, then reduce again by half its volume.
12. Strain the sauce and stir in the remaining lemon juice, butter, and cayenne.
13. Mix truffles and mushrooms.
14. Divide the mixture into two portions and place warm breasts on a serving dish.
15. Top each breast with truffles and mushrooms.
16. Pour the sauce over the breasts and cover with a glass lid.
